questions.question: A bakery sells $25$, $30$, $28$, $32$, and $29$ loaves of bread per day. What is the median number of loaves sold?
A student's grades are $85$, $90$, $78$, $92$, and $88$. What is the mode of these grades?
The commute times for a worker are $25$, $30$, $28$, $32$, and $29$ minutes. What is the mean commute time?
A company has $5$ employees with salaries of $ $40,000 $, $ $45,000 $, $ $50,000 $, $ $55,000 $, and $ $60,000 $. What is the median salary?
The prices of $5$ shirts are $ $15 $, $ $20 $, $ $18 $, $ $22 $, and $ $19 $. What is the mode price?
Which measure of central tendency is most affected by outliers?
A dataset has a mean of $10$ and a median of $12$. Which of the following is a possible mode for the dataset?
What is the primary purpose of using measures of central tendency?

options.A: To describe the spread of a dataset
options.B: To identify outliers in a dataset
options.C: To summarize the typical value of a dataset
options.D: To compare the size of different datasets
options.E: To predict future trends in a dataset

questions.question: A book club has $7$ members who read $3$, $5$, $2$, $6$, $4$, $7$, and $1$ books per month. Calculate the mean, median, and mode of the number of books read per month. Show your work and explain your answers.

A store tracks the number of customers who enter the store each day for a week. The data is as follows: $25$, $30$, $20$, $35$, $28$, $32$, and $29$. Calculate the mean, median, and mode of the data. Then, compare the data sets from two different weeks and discuss any differences or similarities in the measures of central tendency.

teacher_rules: Ensure students show all work and explanations for FRQs
Allow students to use calculators for calculations
Emphasize the importance of interpreting results in context
